channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: CBS News poll finds many express frustration with Trump's economic approach
item.description: Gas prices and inflation weigh on Americans; many see lack of clarity on Iran situation.

item.title: LIRR strike raises concerns about Monday commute; here is the latest update
item.description: The LIRR work stoppage has disrupted weekend events, but the main worry is Monday morning's commute.

item.title: Face the Nation: Fitzpatrick, Suozzi, and Gates
item.description: Missed the second half of the show? Reps. Brian Fitzpatrick and Tom Suozzi of the Problem Solvers Caucus join, plus an interview with former Defense Secretary Gates.

item.title: 5/17: Sunday Morning 'By Design'
item.description: Jane Pauley hosts the annual design look, featuring tiny homes, Louis Vuitton, Adobe house construction, Finland's Marimekko, and more.
